question: Return the full record for Vehicle @vehicle001.
What is the produced time of Vehicle @vehicle002 if it was produced in October 2015?
cypher: MATCH (v:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle002'}) WHERE v.producedTime >= '2015-10-01 00:00:00' AND v.producedTime < '2015-11-01 00:00:00' RETURN v.producedTime

question: What is the name of Vehicle @vehicle003?
Show Part WHT001812A only when its status is active.
What is the current status of Part 18D000731?
Return Part N10435508 together with its current specification.
Show Personnel TFA2A46786 if its name is @name001.
Return all properties of Personnel tfa2a46789 if role as Operator.
Give me the basic profile of Supplier 11152.
Return all properties of Supplier 10151.
Show VehicleVariant only if its power is 96kw.
What is the powertrain type and trim level of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant001?
Return the basic details of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant002.
What is the name of VehicleFamily 321?
Show Equipment MFT-D20 if its current status is Active.
Return the key properties of Equipment MFT-D20.
Show details for Tool D8300384.
Show Production Order PO1015 if it is currently Active.
Show the batch details for Part Batch WHT001812A-150915.
Show Operational Task Task011015-A-1-001-01 if it started after October 2015.
Which VehicleFamily does Vehicle @vehicle001 belong to?
Which Production Order related to Vehicle @vehicle004?
Which Production Plan related to Vehicle @vehicle004?
Which Personnel participated in Operational Task Task011015-A-1-001-01, and role is Operator?
Which Production Order did PartBatch 04E129651H-151005 used for?
Which Operation related to PartBatch 6N0877236-151005?
Which Operation corresponded to the EquipmentInstance MFT-D2X?
Which Operational Tasks belonging to Production Process TFA2A051015A start after October 2015-10-03?
Which Vehicles produced by Production Process TFA2A051015A were produced at October 4th, 2015?
cypher: MATCH (pp:ProductionProcess {identifier: '@productionprocess001'})-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) WHERE v.producedTime >= '2015-10-04 00:00:00' and v.producedTime < '2015-10-05 00:00:00' RETURN v

question: Which Operation does Personnel TFA2A78919 worked on 2015-10-1?
cypher: MATCH (p:Personnel{identifier:'@personnel003'})<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(ot:OperationalTask)-[:INSTANTIATES_OPERATION]->(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation) WHERE ot.startTime>='2015-10-01 00:00:00' AND ot.endTime<='2015-10-02 00:00:00' RETURN o AS Operation

question: Which Personnel did Operation VW321-1-001-01 worked on 2015-10-1?
cypher: MATCH (p:Personnel)<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(o:OperationalTask)-[:INSTANTIATES_OPERATION]->(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(:Operation{identifier:'@operation001'}) WHERE o.startTime>='2015-10-01 00:00:00' AND o.endTime<='2015-10-02 00:00:00' RETURN p

question: Which operations require Part 180711951B?
Which VehicleVariants in VehicleFamily 321 have an 96kw power?
Which shop has Euqipment instance 2425301?
Which VehicleFamilies is Assembly Shop TFA2A qualified to produce?
Which Vehicles are instances of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant003 produced after October 3, 2015?
Which active Production Orders are assigned to ManufacturingPlant tfa2?
Which Vehicles used Part batch 1KD201550-150915?
Which Operational Tasks does Personnel TFA2A78919 participate in October 2015?
cypher: MATCH (per:Personnel {identifier: '@personnel003'})<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(t:OperationalTask) WHERE t.startTime >= '2015-10-01 00:00:00' and t.endTime < '2015-11-1 00:00:00' RETURN t

question: Which plant related to bacth part 1KD201550-151005?
Which VehicleVariant use Part 18D713203T?
Show me vehicle family produced in plant tfa2.
Show me order PO1015's production plan at 2025-10-01.
cypher: MATCH (po:ProductionOrder{identifier: '@productionorder001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionOrderVersion)-[:INSTANTIATES_PLAN]->(pv:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(pp:ProductionPlan) WHERE pv.plannedStartTime >= '2015-10-01 00:00:00' and pv.plannedEndTime < '2015-10-02 00:00:00' RETURN po AS ProductionOrder

question: Which VehicleVariant does Production Order PO1015 cover?
What vehicle variant related to operation VW321-4-078-02?
cypher: MATCH (vv:VehicleVariant)<-[:HAS_VARIANT]-(:VehicleFamily)-[:DESCRIBED_IN]->(:ProductDocument)-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(pdv:ProductDocumentVersion)<-[:DERIVED_FROM]-(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation{identifier:'@operation002'}) RETURN vv AS VehicleVariant, o AS Operation

question: Show me the part suppliers related to operation VW321-1-001-01.
Which VehicleVariants include Part 18D400040NK in their BOM through the part's current specification?
Show me the operations related to part suppliers 10809.
Which VehicleVariants in VehicleFamily 321 have an 81kw power?
Which Operations are applicable to VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant001?
Which plant does the production shop that manufactures Vehicle @vehicle001 belong to?
What production plan covers Vehicle @vehicle001, and which order does that plan fall under?
Which VehicleVariant does Vehicle @vehicle001 belong to, and what VehicleFamily is that variant part of?
Which Vehicles belong to the VehicleVariants under VehicleFamily 321?
Which Part used by Operation VW321-7-150-01 in plant TFA2?
cypher: MATCH (mp:ManufacturingPlant {identifier: '@productionshop001'})-[:HAS_SHOP]->(:ProductionShop)<-[:QUALIFIED_FOR]-(o:Operation{identifier:'@operation003'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:OperationVersion)-[:REQUIRES_PART]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]-(p:Part) RETURN DISTINCT mp, o, p

question: Which ProductionPlans are associated with the ProductionOrders assigned to ManufacturingPlant TFA2?
Which VehicleVariant do the Vehicles produced by ProductionProcess TFA2A011015A belong to?
cypher: MATCH (pp:ProductionProcess {identifier: '@productionprocess002'})-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle)-[:CONFIGURED_TO]->(:VehicleVariantSpecification)<-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]-(vv:VehicleVariant) RETURN DISTINCT pp, v, vv

question: Which ProductionShops are qualified to perform Operations that require Part WHT001812A?
cypher: MATCH (p:Part {identifier: '@part001'})-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:REQUIRES_PART]-(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation)-[:QUALIFIED_FOR]->(ps:ProductionShop) RETURN DISTINCT p, o, ps

question: Which Personnel are assigned to the ProductionProcesses realizing ProductionPlan PL011015?
cypher: MATCH (pl:ProductionPlan {identifier: '@productionplan001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:REALIZES_PLAN]-(pp:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]->(per:Personnel) RETURN DISTINCT pl, pp, per

question: Which ProductionOrders are assigned to the ManufacturingPlant that Vehicle @vehicle001 is produced at?
cypher: MATCH (v:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle001'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:REALIZES_PLAN]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:INSTANTIATES_PLAN]-(:ProductionOrderVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(po:ProductionOrder)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(mp:ManufacturingPlant) RETURN DISTINCT v, mp, po

question: Which vehicles were produced in shop TFA2A and are also assigned to production order PO1015?
Which operations use Part WHT001812A and are also performed in AssemblyShop TFA2A?
Which personnel worked on ProductionProcess TFA2A011015A and also handled Vehicle @vehicle001?
Which VehicleVariants belong to VehicleFamily 321 and are qualified to be produced at AssemblyShop TFA2A?
Which Parts are in the BOM of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant003 and also supplied by Supplier 11152?
Which Operations require Part WHT001812A and are also applicable to VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004?
Which Vehicles are produced under ProductionOrder PO1015 and belong to VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004?
Which Vehicles were produced under ProductionPlan PL011015 and consumed batch part 1KD201550-150915?
Which ProductionProcesses realize ProductionPlan PL011015 and occur at AssemblyShop TFA2A?
Which Personnel worked on both Vehicle @vehicle001 and Vehicle @vehicle002?
Which operations are related to Part WHT001812A or Part 18D000731?
cypher: MATCH (p:Part)-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:REQUIRES_PART]-(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation) WHERE p.identifier IN ['@part001', '@part002'] RETURN DISTINCT o

question: Show me all vehicles produced by ProductionProcess TFA2A011015A or ProductionProcess TFA2A011015B.
cypher: MATCH (pp:ProductionProcess)-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) WHERE pp.identifier IN ['@productionprocess002', '@personnel004'] RETURN DISTINCT v

question: Which Personnel worked on Vehicle @vehicle001 or Vehicle @vehicle002?
cypher: MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle001'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]->(per:Personnel) RETURN DISTINCT per UNION MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle002'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]->(per:Personnel) RETURN DISTINCT per

question: Which Parts appear in the BOM of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant003 or VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant001?
cypher: MATCH (vv:VehicleVariant)-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:VehicleVariantSpecification)-[:HAS_BOMITEM]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]-(p:Part) WHERE vv.identifier IN ['@vehiclevariant003', '@vehiclevariant001'] RETURN DISTINCT p

question: Which Parts are supplied by Supplier 11152 or Supplier 11286?
cypher: MATCH (p:Part)-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:PartSpecification)-[:HAS_SUPPLIER]->(s:Supplier) WHERE s.identifier IN ['@supplier001', '@supplier004'] RETURN DISTINCT p

question: Which Vehicles were produced under ProductionPlan PL011015 or worked on by Personnel TFA2A46786?
cypher: MATCH (:ProductionPlan {identifier: '@productionplan001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:REALIZES_PLAN]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) RETURN DISTINCT v UNION MATCH (:Personnel {identifier: '@personnel001'})<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(:OperationalTask)<-[:HAS_TASK]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) RETURN DISTINCT v

question: Which Suppliers were used in producing Vehicle @vehicle005 or under ProductionOrder PO1015?
cypher: MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle005'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:CONSUMES_PART]->(:PartInstance)-[:SUPPLIED_BY]->(s:Supplier) RETURN DISTINCT s.identifier, s.name UNION MATCH (:ProductionOrder {identifier: '@productionorder001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionOrderVersion)-[:INSTANTIATES_PLAN]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:REALIZES_PLAN]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:CONSUMES_PART]->(:PartInstance)-[:SUPPLIED_BY]->(s:Supplier) RETURN DISTINCT s.identifier, s.name

question: Which EquipmentInstances were used in producing Vehicle @vehicle001 or Vehicle @vehicle004?
cypher: MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle001'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:USE_EQUIPMENT]->(ei:EquipmentInstance) RETURN DISTINCT ei UNION MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle004'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:USE_EQUIPMENT]->(ei:EquipmentInstance) RETURN DISTINCT ei

question: Which ProductionShops belong to ManufacturingPlant TFA2 or are used by ProductionProcess TFA2A011015A?
cypher: MATCH (:ManufacturingPlant {identifier: '@productionshop001'})-[:HAS_SHOP]->(s:ProductionShop) RETURN DISTINCT s UNION MATCH (:ProductionProcess {identifier: '@productionprocess002'})-[:OCCURS_AT]->(s:ProductionShop) RETURN DISTINCT s

question: Which VehicleVariants in VehicleFamily 321 have 96KW or 81KW powertrains?
cypher: MATCH (:VehicleFamily {identifier: '@vehiclefamily001'})-[:HAS_VARIANT]->(vv:VehicleVariant) WHERE vv.power IN ['96kw', '81kw'] RETURN DISTINCT vv

question: Tell me about Vehicle @vehicle001, ProductionOrder TFA2A011015A, and Part WHT001812A.
Which Operations require Part WHT001812A? Also tell me about Vehicle @vehicle001.
Which Suppliers provide Part WHT001812A? Also tell me about VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004.
Tell me about ManufacturingPlant TFA2, VehicleFamily 321, and Personnel TFA2A46786.
Which Vehicles are produced under ProductionPlan PL011015? Also tell me about Part WHT001812A.
Tell me about AssemblyShop AS321, ProductionOrder TFA2A011015A, and VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004.
Who are the Personnel working on Vehicle @vehicle001? Also tell me about ProductionProcess TFA2A011015A.
Which ManufacturingPlants build VehicleFamily 321? Also tell me about ProductionOrder PO1015.
Tell me about Vehicle @vehicle001, Part WHT001812A, and Personnel TFA2A46786.
Which VehicleVariants are under VehicleFamily 321? Also tell me about ProductionProcess TFA2A011015A.
What ProductionPlan and ProductionOrder is Vehicle @vehicle006 linked to? Also give me details on Part WHT001812A.
Show me Vehicles that fall under ProductionOrder PO1015 through its plan and process. Also tell me about Shop TFA2A.
Which Suppliers provide Parts used in Vehicle @vehicle005? Also show details on ProductionOrder po1015.
Which ProductionOrders cover Vehicles of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004? Also give me details on Part 18D839462E.
Who are the Personnel on ProductionProcesses under PL011015? Also show details for ManufacturingPlant tfa2.
Which ProductionPlans are under productionorders assigned to ManufacturingPlant TFA2? Also show VehicleFamily 321.
Which ProductionShops handle Operations requiring Part WHT001812A? Also show Vehicle @vehicle001.
Which VehicleVariants do Vehicles from ProductionProcess TFA2A011015A belong to? Also show details on ProductionPlan PL011015.
Which Vehicles under VehicleFamily 321 and were assembled using parts from Supplier 10086?
Which ProductionOrders orders VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004, or are assigned to ManufacturingPlant TFA2?
cypher: MATCH (:VehicleVariant {identifier: '@vehiclevariant004'})<-[:ORDERS_VARIANT]-(:ProductionOrderVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(po:ProductionOrder) RETURN DISTINCT po UNION MATCH (po:ProductionOrder)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(:ManufacturingPlant {identifier: '@productionshop001'}) RETURN DISTINCT po
